creator: me@janh.de
text:
I have not really solved my problem in http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=135161 -- but I am producing further updates.

finance/aqbanking needs a shared library version bump, which is included in the update to aqbanking-4.1.0 in the next problem report.

Fix: With the patch, gwenhywfar-3.9.0 builds, installs, and a package can be created.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: gwenhywfar-3.8.3 to 3.9.0
